name: decision-quality-layer
description: Decision Quality Layer — 5-axis reasoning verification for AI agents

scripts.scenarios:spike: npm run build && node scripts/run-spike-scenarios.mjs --file scenarios/spike-40-coarse.jsonl --expect 40
scripts.scenarios:spike-coarse: npm run build && node scripts/run-spike-scenarios.mjs --file scenarios/spike-40-coarse.jsonl --expect 40
scripts.scenarios:spike-subtle: npm run build && node scripts/run-spike-scenarios.mjs --file scenarios/spike-40-subtle.jsonl --expect 40
scripts.scenarios:spike-80: npm run build && node scripts/run-spike-scenarios.mjs --file scenarios/spike-80.jsonl --expect 80
